# services.invoiceplane

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.invoiceplane`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.invoiceplane` | `submodule` | InvoicePlane configuration. |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Specification of one or more InvoicePlane sites to serve |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites.<name>.cron.enable` | `boolean` | Enable cron service which periodically runs Invoiceplane tasks. Requires key taken from the administration page. Refer to <https://wiki.invoiceplane.com/en/1.0/modules/recurring-invoices> on how to configure it. |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites.<name>.cron.key` | `string` | Cron key taken from the administration page. |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites.<name>.database.createLocally` | `boolean` | Create the database and database user locally. |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites.<name>.database.host` | `string` | Database host address. |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites.<name>.database.name` | `string` | Database name. |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites.<name>.database.passwordFile` | `null or absolute path` | A file containing the password corresponding to {option}`database.user`. |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites.<name>.database.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Database host port. |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites.<name>.database.user` | `string` | Database user. |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable InvoicePlane web application. |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites.<name>.invoiceTemplates` | `list of absolute path` | List of path(s) to respective template(s) which are copied from the 'invoice_templates/pdf' directory. ::: {.note} These templates need to be packaged before use, see example. ::: |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites.<name>.poolConfig` | `attribute set of (string or signed integer or boolean)` | Options for the InvoicePlane PHP pool. See the documentation on `php-fpm.conf` for details on configuration directives. |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites.<name>.quoteTemplates` | `list of absolute path` | List of path(s) to respective template(s) which are copied from the 'quote_templates/pdf' directory. ::: {.note} These templates need to be packaged before use, see example. ::: |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites.<name>.settings` | `attribute set of anything` | Structural InvoicePlane configuration. Refer to <https://github.com/InvoicePlane/InvoicePlane/blob/master/ipconfig.php.example> for details and supported values. |
| `services.invoiceplane.sites.<name>.stateDir` | `absolute path` | This directory is used for uploads of attachments and cache. The directory passed here is automatically created and permissions adjusted as required. |
| `services.invoiceplane.webserver` | `one of "caddy", "nginx"` | Which webserver to use for virtual host management. |
